HESI655 Organizational Dimensions of Student Affairs (3 Credits) Exploration of leadership and organizational change of student affairs programs in post-secondary education.

Prerequisite: EDCP610; or permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCP655 or HESI655.
